The '''gumfish''' was indigenous to the swamps of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]], and a favorite meal of the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]]. While loved by these amphibious peoples, most other species can't abide the bitter-tasting flesh of this fish. This is largely due to the gumfishes' diet - plants in the waterways of Naboo mostly use [[Wikipedia:chemosynthesis|chemosynthesis]] rather than [[Wikipedia:photosynthesis|photosynthesis]] to produce energy. This process creates a sulfurous taste which is passed on to the gumfish.<ref name="SWG" />
